mapper.select: SELECT rt.name AS name, COUNT(rr.id) AS count FROM repair_record rr LEFT JOIN repair_type rt ON rr.type_id = rt.id GROUP BY rt.name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT location AS name, COUNT(id) AS count FROM repair_record WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND location != '' GROUP BY location ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT rt.name AS name, COUNT(rr.id) AS count FROM repair_record rr LEFT JOIN repair_type rt ON rr.type_id = rt.id WHERE rr.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY rt.name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT location AS name, COUNT(id) AS count FROM repair_record WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND location != '' AND create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY location ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT status AS name, COUNT(id) AS count FROM repair_record GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
